questions.question: Rewrite with the same meaning: “I started living here in 2020.” I {a1}.
Choose the form for a temporary situation: This month she {a1}.
Rewrite: “I last saw him on Monday.” I {a1}.

a1.answer: have not seen him since Monday

questions.question: Choose the background action: When I arrived, they {a1}.

a1.answer: have been playing for two hours
